demographics.living_situation: lives at home with an adult child who is present and helping

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I'm constantly leaking urine, my stomach is swollen up like a balloon, and I'm so nauseous I can't eat anything at all. (Adult child on the call: he's been getting weaker and weaker and today he can barely get out of bed.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Over the last day or two he's become really nauseous, off his food and exhausted, and his belly has swollen up hugely while the leaking just keeps going.

symptom_narrative.onset: The waterworks trouble has crept up over more than two years; the swollen belly and leaking have built up slowly over months; the nausea, loss of appetite and severe tiredness came on over the last 48 hours.
symptom_narrative.duration: Years of urinary trouble; days of feeling systemically unwell.
symptom_narrative.character: A weak, dribbling stream and difficulty starting for a long time, now with constant involuntary leaking day and night; a huge tight swollen lower belly; feeling washed-out, sick and unable to eat.
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: He says he feels dreadful — too weak and sick to stand, and the belly is swollen bigger than he's ever seen it.
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: Lower belly swelling; leaking from the waterworks; whole-body tiredness and nausea.
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: Constant leaking; the swelling and weakness are steadily getting worse.
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: It has just kept building up on its own.
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: Swelling of both legs over the past week; no appetite; feeling sick; smells of urine around him despite pads/towels; strangely, no real pain in the swollen belly.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: He has had trouble passing water for a couple of years but never sought help.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: Now essentially bedbound and too weak to stand safely; previously independent.

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: Long-standing waterworks / prostate trouble (weak stream, difficulty starting) for over two years that he ignored
past_medical_history.how_managed: Not managed — he avoided all doctors and medical care out of fear

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Has avoided medical care entirely for years out of fear; adult child is now present and worried; high fall risk due to weakness; home smells strongly of urine with soiled towels used as makeshift pads.

objective_data_offered.value: his lower belly is hugely swollen and bloated, tight and rounded
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described/observed on video by the caregiver, not a clinical examination

objective_data_offered.value: both his lower legs and ankles look puffy and swollen
he looks very pale, washed-out and unwell, and there's an unusual smell on his breath
urine keeps dribbling out continuously and he can't control it
he is too weak and nauseated to get out of bed today and keeps retching
about 86 kg on the home scales
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: home scales, single reading, not calibrated
